column1: # Talo reading-coverage reference — the concept spine the lexicon is scaled to cover (docs/0013).
# Source: Intercontinental Dictionary Series (IDS) via Concepticon (Key-2016-1310),
#   concepts in 22 semantic chapters; named as the lexicon spine in docs/0003 §1.
# A concept is 'covered' when the Talo lexicon EXPRESSES it (a root, a legal
# derivation/compound, or a grammatical word). Coverage is measured by
# tools/reading-coverage; the uncovered rows are the (triage-then-mint) queue.
